content:
# Literature Review

## Scope / corpus summary
Seven paper sources are included.

## Evidence Matrix
Structured matrix is attached.

## Cross-paper synthesis
The corpus supports bounded cross-paper synthesis with paper citations.

## Agreements
The papers agree on LEO beamforming constraints.

## Disagreements / gaps
Methods and evaluation settings differ; real-world validation remains open.

## Limitations
Evidence is snippet-bounded.

## Citation-grounded conclusion
The conclusion is grounded only in paper citation evidence.

citations.quote: The paper reports LEO satellite beamforming methods, evaluation metrics, and bounded deployment limitations.

agreements: The papers agree that LEO beamforming needs bounded method and evaluation claims.
disagreements: The papers differ in method emphasis, data assumptions, and evaluation setup.
gaps: Real-world deployment validation remains an evidence gap.
limitations: This fixture cites only paper evidence; memory/tool logs/trace are excluded from citations.
